$comment: scripts/BillsHouse.asm — Bill-as-a-POKéMON, FULLY AUTHORED (wave C): his pitch is a yes/no; refusing gets the guilt-trip and he proceeds anyway; then the teleporter instructions and he steps in.

commands.text:
Hiya! I'm a
POKéMON... ...No I'm not! Call me BILL!
I'm a true blue
POKéMANIAC! Hey! I screwed up an
experiment and got
combined with a
POKéMON! So, how about it?
Help me out here!

else.text:
No!? Come on, you
gotta help a guy
in deep trouble! What do you say,
chief? Please?
OK? All right!

commands.text:
When I'm in the
TELEPORTER, go to
my PC and run the
Cell Separation
System!
